title: gh-release-create — input
description: Input for `gh release create <tag> --title <title> --notes <notes>`. Step 14 (publish-github-release) — also the manual-fallback path for the `bot-tag-doesnt-trigger-release-prod` FailureMode (FR-008): when GITHUB_TOKEN's bot-tag does not fire release-prod, the founder runs `gh release create` manually.

tag.description: the existing tag to attach the release to; the workflow has already created + pushed it

generate_notes.description: fall back to `gh release create --generate-notes` (GitHub auto-generates from commits since last tag); defaults to false
